args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'
